name: Instagram Add Account with TOTP 2FA v2

steps.goal: From the home feed, long-press the profile picture icon in the bottom-right corner of the navigation bar to open the account switcher popup. In the account switcher, tap the 'Add Instagram account' button. After tapping it, wait a few seconds for the next screen to load — do NOT scroll or use find_and_tap, just wait. Then: if you see a screen with 'Log into existing account' and 'Create new account', tap 'Log into existing account'. If you see a screen listing existing accounts with a 'Use another profile' button, tap 'Use another profile'. If you land directly on a login screen with username/password fields, you are done. After each tap, wait for the screen to transition before taking the next action.

on_login_screen.description: The Instagram login screen is visible with username and password input fields and a Log in button

accounts_count.description: The number of Instagram accounts currently signed in, as seen in the account switcher or account picker screen

steps.goal: First: if you see a system popup overlay (e.g., from Google Password Manager, Android Credential Manager, or Samsung Autofill asking to sign in with a saved password), dismiss it — use dismiss_popup with whatever dismiss button is visible (e.g., 'Not now', 'None of the above', 'X', 'Close'), or tap outside the popup to close it. Then: tap the 'Username, email or mobile number' input field to focus it, then use clear to remove any pre-filled text, then type '{{username}}'. Tap the 'Password' input field to focus it, then type '{{password}}'. Tap 'Log in'. After tapping Log in, wait for the response. If you see 'Waiting for approval', tap 'Try another way', then select 'Authentication app', then tap 'Continue'. You are done when you see the security code input screen.

on_2fa_screen.description: A security code / 2FA input screen appeared after login
